rulings.Case Title: DAVID KARNER et al VS. ROY SHIMEK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-537959 WITH CASE CGC-13-529365
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 12, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANTS ROY SHIMEK, PATRICIA SHIMEK, SHIMEK PROPERTIES LLC and CANADIAN-AMERICAN OIL COMPANY's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-537959 WITH CASE CGC-13-529365 Continued to June 5, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of reply papers to Department 501 no later than May 16, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: JOE TABONI et al VS. VERMONT STREET TOWN HOMES LLC, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Allowing Further Session Of Deposition Of Joseph Toboni
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 12, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY BROWN's Motion For Order Allowing Further Session Of Deposition Of Joseph Toboni OFF CALENDAR, moot. Joe Toboni agreed to appear for third day of deposition on May 12, 2014. = (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN PAPPAGEORGE VS. MARTIN V MURPHY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demand For Indentificationm And Production Of Documents To Set One; Demand For Indemnificationadn Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 12, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF JOHN PAPPAGEORGE's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demand For Indemnification And Production Of Documents To Set One GRANTED. No opposition filed. Sanctions granted against defendants and their counsel in the amount of $1,122.50. = (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: CAL-MURPHY, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. MG RESTAURANTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 12, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT MG RESTAURANTS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to May 19, 2014 on Court's own motion. = (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MAYFIELD et al VS. BALDWIN FRANK MYERS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 12, 2014, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT ASHOK PATEL's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Moving party's counsel repeatedly fails to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C and disregard's court's repeated orders to comply. See CUD-13-645231 6/10/13 minute order; CGC-14-536744 3/19/14 minute order. = (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: BLUE MOUNTAIN HOMES LLC VS. JOHN G. CARIAGA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Entering Deft'S Default For Failure To Obey Discovery Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 12, 2014, line 10. PLAINTIFF BLUE MOUNTAIN HOMES LLC's Motion For Order Entering Defendant's Default For Failure To Obey Discovery Order GRANTED. Answer is stricken. Plaintiff may file request for default. = (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: NORTH EAST MEDICAL SERVICES VS. LAW OFFICES OF ANSEL D. KINNEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 12, 2014, line 5. PLAINTIFF NORTH EAST MEDICAL SERVICES' Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs GRANTED in the amount of $15,505. = (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN WONG VS. NICK LANHAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 12, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT NICK LANHAM's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/PHA)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 12, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANT WILLIAM KENNEDY's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED, 5 days to respond. Complaint sufficiently alleges the elements of forcible detainer, including "menaces and threats of violence." See Paragraph 15. = (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: 17-19 BOARDMAN PLACE, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. LON WHITE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 12, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT LON WHITE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Causes of action for unlawful detainer are sufficiently alleged. Demurrer improperly challenges factual allegations in the Complaint, which must be accepted as true. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/PHA)
